todos.content: Check Tavily CLI status (tvly --status) to confirm authentication
Search the web with tvly for the serial number of the Hasselblad/Zeiss lens used to take the 1972 'Blue Marble' (Apollo 17) and collect authoritative sources
Verify serial number from primary/authoritative sources (NASA, Hasselblad, museum archives) and extract citation URLs
Write /_outputs/blue_marble_serial.txt containing: full serial number, last two digits, one or two source URLs
Return final artifact paths and a one-line summary to the user
